creator: dsh@bamus.cz
text:
Hi!

I'd like to confirm I see lots of same messages on my new server which uses 12.2-p3 and

smartpqi0@pci0:4:0:0:   class=0x010700 card=0x0654103c chip=0x028f9005 rev=0x01 hdr=0x00
    vendor     = 'Adaptec'
    device     = 'Smart Storage PQI 12G SAS/PCIe 3'
    class      = mass storage
    subclass   = SAS

smartpqi0: <E208i-a SR Gen10> port 0x3000-0x30ff mem 0x80300000-0x80307fff at device 0.0 numa-domain 0 on pci3
smartpqi0: using MSI-X interrupts (4 vectors)

I suppose smartd is the source of such messages.
